name: capability-orchestrator
description: Auto-routing plugin for Claude Code and Codex — semantic + literal + cross-language matching for skills, commands, and MCP tools

scripts.test: node --test tests/scan.test.cjs tests/skill-contract.test.cjs tests/install-hooks.test.cjs tests/route-matcher.test.cjs tests/route-logger.test.cjs tests/live-verify.test.cjs tests/release-readiness-check.test.cjs tests/fuzz.test.cjs tests/stress.test.cjs tests/integration.test.cjs tests/platform.test.cjs tests/host-adapter-bridge.test.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:install && npm run test:idempotent

author: Zhiming Deng
